author: SeasonalAnarchy
title: Useless app and Hopeless support
content:
It used to be a decent player despite its clunky interface. But over time, it has transformed into one of the most frustrating and useless music apps on the entire App Store.

It seems to have a mind of its own — not in an AI way, but in how it randomly decides how long a song should play. And for some reason, it absolutely hates lock screens. The moment your screen locks, it assumes you no longer want to listen to music, stops playback, and even clears the “Now Playing” history — just to make sure you can’t easily resume the track.

As for network and cloud connectivity? It simply doesn’t work. At all.

Customer support is a complete joke. Don’t expect a reply — you’ll never hear back from them.

Which leaves one simple question: what do you call a music player that can’t actually play music?

author: Dawn2320
title: PowerAmp of iOS
content: This is THE BEST Offline Hi Res Player on iOS and mercifully it’s a one time purchase as compared to other players which are subscription based. I find it ridiculous to subscribe and pay forever for an offline audio files player. I am really grateful developers. Please keep this player alive by updating it and PLEASE retain the one time purchase model. Thanks a lot again!

author: subash muthusamy
title: App is making my device slow
content:
I could observe that my files application is getting unresponsive when I have this application installed. Due to this, I was facing issues with Photos, Safari even Settings becoming unresponsive. When I offload this application, all is normal. That is strange. I was just trying to figure out why my entire device is slow because of this app, but couldn’t find anything. I’m not sure if there was similar issue reported before. May be because I have more songs offline. I have songs of 20GB offline and it counts 4000+ in number.

But, apart from this, I just love this app. The quality of music I hear on my downloaded songs is just incredible. I have been searching for an app like this for so many months. 

But, unfortunately it didn’t suit my device and I can no longer even keep it in my device.

author: Nandu1985
title: GUI of options
content:
Instead of offering so many options like play from various clouds, if the developer can optimise the space utility i.e like iPhones, keeping everything simple and easily reachable by clearing out genius options. 

The Amp & pre-amp settings need to be intuitive to understand the + & - for average users like myself cos I had to google which I personally find no issues with but critical nonetheless! 

Since a DAC (Digital audio codec)is always needed to experience the absolute awesomeness of the FLAC sound, it serves all the reason to clear the clutter and simplify!

author: VrMaverix
title: Playlists don’t work properly
content:
Music files from Playlist are automatically deleted repeatedly.

Installed this app to create and make playlists work through my music files. But after creating a playlist, whenever I hit “Play All”, it just plays the first one and stops. 

If I have to click on Play every time, then I might as well use the “Files” app itself. Why bother having another app? If the devs fix these, I’d be more than happy to use the app and change my review.

author: Sharadn
title: No upnp/dlna support
content: Though I have been a paid user of this app, I am disappointed not to get upnp/dlna support despite other features being implemented. Though I have been playing via airplay thru my raspberry pi .. however couple of my sound bars don’t support airplay. So I believe having this implementation would go a long way in customer satisfaction.

author: Allwin Bright
title: The Best music player for playing Hi-Res Audio tracks… Hands down
content:
I was looking for a music player that could play my collection of High resolution audio files offline. Flacbox is everything I wanted in a music player - Clean and beautiful user interface, neatly organised music library, ability to music files of AIFF, WAV and FLAC formats offline… I really couldn’t have asked for more. 

A special shout out to the developer for developing such a wonderful music player.

Why don’t you read from metadata or look for jpg files in the folder?

content: It's a really nice player, maybe one of the best flac player out there. This player has an added advantage of having the iPad interface. author: Store Editor
title: Please bring back "Continue Last Play" option
content:
30/01/2020
The feature by which I was able to continue playing the last song at the exact moment it was playing, has been removed in latest updates. It was quite beneficial to many users I'm sure. @Dev please bring it back.

== Full screen ads - FIXED! ==
The app is one of the best free audio player apps in the iOS store, but the full screen ads seriously suck. There's no way to close them, I have to wait for a specific time after which they close automatically. You should provide an explicit close button to close the ads. Provide a timer for the closing time.
